products.name: Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) for Composite Parts
products.descriptor: In-house ultrasonic, X-ray/CT, and thermography NDT for composite aerospace parts

evidence.snippet:
### Non-Destructive Evaluation (NDE/NDT)
*   **Ultrasonic Testing (UT):** Detects delamination, porosity, and disbonds
*   **X-ray/Computed Tomography (RT/CT):** Visualizes internal structure for complex parts
*   **Thermography/Shearography (as program-required):** Rapid indication of subsurface defects

products.name: Low-Rate Initial Production (LRIP) for Composite Parts
products.descriptor: Gated LRIP service bridging prototype qualification to full-rate composite production

evidence.snippet:
Low‑Rate Initial Production (LRIP) for Composite Parts
======================================================
Aug 22, 2025 | [Uncategorized](https://compositesuniversal.com/category/uncategorized/)
**De‑risk your ramp.** CUG’s LRIP programs take proven prototypes and first articles into controlled, repeatable, and cost‑aware production—without jeopardizing quality, schedule, or certification.

products.name: Contract Composite Manufacturing for Aerospace
products.descriptor: Full-service contract composite manufacturing for aerospace OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers

evidence.snippet:
Qualified Aerospace Production Partner
======================================
Aug 8, 2025 | [Uncategorized](https://compositesuniversal.com/category/uncategorized/)
**Composites Universal Group (CUG)** is a trusted and qualified aerospace production partner delivering advanced composite manufacturing solutions for commercial, defense, and spaceflight applications. Based in California, we support OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers with precision-built composite structures, strict quality compliance, and scalable production capacity.

evidence.snippet: With three decades of experience supporting the experimental aircraft, aerospace, and unmanned industries, our composite manufacturing abilities also extend to emerging technologies in defense, transportation, medical, and industrial applications.

Tight-Tolerance Composite Assemblies (https://compositesuniversal.com/tight-tolerance-composite-assemblies) has a dedicated page that was skipped; evidence drawn from dimensional-verification section of quality-control page.

Dedicated tight-tolerance assemblies page — would confirm product scope and provide direct citations for dimensional-accuracy claims.
Dedicated contract manufacturing page — would provide direct evidence for this service offering beyond the production-partner article.
Industries-served page — would confirm which verticals (UAV, UUV, eVTOL, defense) are actively served and may reveal additional product/service categories.
